THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SANDRA STEPHENSON. DEFENDANT RYAN PURSEL PRESENT VIA CURTCALL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
